home_hero.experience_years: Trusted Geotechnical & Soil Testing Expertise Since 1996

who_we_are.label: WHO WE ARE
who_we_are.p1: Al Dana Engineering Laboratories is a specialized engineering laboratory established in 1996 in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.
who_we_are.p2: We provide professional geotechnical investigations, soil testing, and construction material testing services to support infrastructure, building, and industrial projects.
who_we_are.p3: With over 25 years of experience, we deliver accurate data and certified reports that enable safe, reliable, and informed engineering decisions.

geotechnical.title: Geotechnical Investigations
geotechnical.desc: Rotary drilling, SPT testing, soil and rock sampling, groundwater level measurement.
geotechnical.long_desc: Professional site investigation services to evaluate soil and ground conditions for engineering design.

soil.title: Soil Testing Services
soil.desc: Soil classification, particle size analysis, Atterberg limits, rock strength testing.
soil.long_desc: Laboratory testing to determine soil and rock engineering characteristics and behavior.

chemical.title: Chemical Testing
chemical.desc: Sulphates, chlorides, pH testing, soil and groundwater chemical analysis.
chemical.long_desc: Chemical analysis to evaluate soil and groundwater suitability for construction applications.

geophysical.title: Geophysical Services
geophysical.desc: Subsurface investigations using advanced geophysical techniques.
geophysical.long_desc: Non-invasive methods to image the subsurface and identify underground features with high precision.

building.title: Building Material Testing
building.desc: Concrete cube testing, compression strength testing, concrete core testing.
building.long_desc: Quality control testing for concrete and construction materials.

oil_gas.title: Oil & Gas Services
oil_gas.desc: Onshore and offshore soil testing and laboratory support for energy sector projects.
oil_gas.long_desc: Specialized testing and geotechnical support for onshore and offshore industrial projects.

site.title: Site Investigation
site.desc: Testing and analysis of soil properties for safe and reliable construction.

iso.title: ISO/IEC 17025:2017
iso.desc: Accredited for testing and calibration laboratories, ensuring competence, impartiality, and consistent operation.

enas.title: ENAS Accredited
enas.desc: Emirates National Accreditation System certified laboratory with recognized testing capabilities.

government.desc: Pre-qualified and approved by UAE government entities for engineering and testing services.

project_workflow.label: PROJECT WORKFLOW
project_workflow.title: 5-Stage Engineering Progress
project_workflow.desc: Track your project through each critical phase of our accredited soil investigation and laboratory testing process.

s1.title: Project Approval & Mobilization
s1.desc: Client request review, documentation approval, and scheduling of investigation activities according to project requirements and UAE authority regulations.
s1.label: Approved

s2.title: Engineering Team Preparation
s2.desc: Allocation of geologists, drilling operators, and field technicians. Equipment inspection and site planning prior to mobilization.
s2.label: Ready for Field Work

s3.title: Field Investigation & Sample Collection
s3.desc: Rotary drilling operations, Standard Penetration Testing (SPT), soil and rock sampling, and groundwater measurements conducted at site locations.
s3.label: Samples Collected

s4.title: Laboratory Testing & Analysis
s4.desc: Samples transferred to the laboratory for geotechnical and chemical testing including soil classification, moisture content, sulphate and chloride analysis, and rock strength testing.
s4.label: In Progress

s5.title: Engineering Reporting & Certified Results
s5.desc: Preparation of certified geotechnical investigation reports and engineering analysis in accordance with international testing standards. Estimated reporting period may extend up to several weeks depending on laboratory analysis requirements.
s5.label: Pending

certs_intro.title: Commited to Delivering Engineering Excellence

overview.label: PROJECT OVERVIEW
overview.title: Investigation Summary
overview.p1: This investigation project evaluates subsurface soil conditions to support foundation design and construction safety requirements for the proposed high-rise tower development on Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi.
overview.p2: The scope of work includes rotary borehole drilling to depths of 30 meters, Standard Penetration Testing (SPT) at regular intervals, collection of disturbed and undisturbed soil samples, and groundwater level measurements. Laboratory testing encompasses soil classification, particle size analysis, Atterberg limits, moisture content determination, and chemical analysis including sulphate, chloride, and pH testing of soil and groundwater samples.
overview.p3: All field and laboratory operations are conducted in accordance with BS, ASTM, and relevant international standards. The final geotechnical investigation report will provide engineering recommendations for foundation design, bearing capacity assessment, and settlement analysis to ensure safe and reliable construction outcomes.

project_name.label: PROJECT NAME
project_name.value: Geotechnical Investigation — Al Reem Island Tower

location.label: LOCATION
location.value: Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE

u3.message: Field investigation completed. All 48 disturbed and 18 undisturbed samples collected successfully.

u4.message: Drilling operations commenced at Borehole BH-1. SPT testing underway.

u5.message: Engineering team mobilized to Al Reem Island site. Equipment setup complete.

u6.message: Project documentation approved. Investigation plan confirmed by client.
